title: Kalshi hits record June trading volume as World Cup fuels prediction markets
summary: DefiLlama data shows Kalshi posted a record month for trading volume as the expanded FIFA World Cup boosted prediction market activity.

title: Bollinger Bands creator eyes Bitcoin bear-market end, 'W'-shaped reversal
summary: Bitcoin price strength could "break" the entire downtrend if the reversal pattern completed, John Bollinger suggested in light of the BTC rebound.

title: Brazil’s Durigan Says Credit Lines Won’t Affect Monetary Policy
summary: Credit measures introduced by President Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva’s government do not undermine monetary policy, Finance Minister Dario Durigan said in an interview with local news website G1 published on Saturday.

title: Bitcoin to $53K? Exchange Deposits Jump as Analysts Warn of Increased Volatility
summary: Bitcoin bounced back above $60,000 this week, but increased volatility might be on the way as crypto deposits to exchanges spike.

title: Perplexity Co-Founder: AI Safety Is an Excuse to Lock Down Frontier

title: CryptoQuant says bitcoin and altcoin exchange deposits have spiked, indicating higher volatility ahead
summary: Bitcoin deposits to exchanges recently climbed to nearly 49,000 BTC, "a rare extreme" seen only four other times this year, CryptoQuant said.

title: Francis Fukuyama: The problem of equality
summary: We must understand our identity to be fundamentally rooted in a set of ideas, not the racial or ethnic identity of our ancestors
